title: The Leonardo Collection Botanical Compact Mirror - William Morris - Classic Floral Pattern Travel Accessory - ASSORTED DESIGNS, One Chosen at Random
features: HIGH QUALITY COMPACT MIRROR: This gorgeous compact mirror is perfect for on the go touch ups and is both practical and appealing.
ASSORTED DESIGNS: There are three designs available, one will be chosen and supplied at random.
WILLIAM MORRIS: The floral pattern on each mirror is taken from a classic artistic design taken from an original artwork by William Morris.

EASY TO USE: This travel mirror is portable, lightweight, and very compact. Suitable for use at parties, concerts or on the go, the travel mirror can be placed in any small bag, backpack, handbag and cosmetic case.
WILLIAM MORRIS: The pattern on each mirror is taken from a classic artistic design taken from an original artwork by William Morris.
